title: enhypen debut — border: day one
description: enhypen officially debuts with the ep border: day one under belift lab / hybe.

title: dimension: dilemma — first full album
description: first full-length studio album dimension: dilemma released, debuting at no. 11 on the billboard 200.

title: manifesto: day 1 — first world tour
description: manifesto: day 1 album released alongside the start of enhypen's first world tour.
